runner_rows: 90039 ubuntu         0 bash -c python3 - <<'PY' import json, os, subprocess, time from pathlib import Path rows=[] ps=subprocess.run(["ps","-eo","pid,user,etimes,args"], text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, check=True).stdout.splitlines()[1:] for line in ps:     if "xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py" in line and "python" in line:         rows.append(line.strip()) root=Path("/srv/pm_as_ofi/shared-ingress-main") checks={} for name in ["market.sock","broker_manifest.json","heartbeat.json"]:     p=root/name     checks[name]={"exists": p.exists()}     if p.exists():         st=p.stat()         checks[name].update({"size": st.st_size, "mtime": st.st_mtime, "is_socket": p.is_socket(), "is_file": p.is_file()}) manifest_path=root/"broker_manifest.json" manifest=None if manifest_path.exists():     try:         manifest=json.loads(manifest_path.read_text())     except Exception as exc:         manifest={"parse_error": str(exc)} print(json.dumps({"checked_at": time.time(), "runner_rows": rows, "xuan_research_runner_rows": [r for r in rows if "/xuan_research_runs/" in r], "shared_ingress": checks, "broker_manifest": manifest}, indent=2, sort_keys=True)) PY
